reference: Hello Doctor, while having sex, the condom tore. I took a morning-after pill the next day. Then I had intercourse again on the same day and the next day, but I am not sure if my partner ejaculated inside or not. Now I am uncertain if I should take another pill because according to the internet, it is not wise to take these pills this frequently. However, I also do not want to become pregnant. Please help!
text: Hello doctor. While having sex, the condom tore. I took a morning-after pill the next day. Then I had intercourse again on the same day and the next day. But I am not sure if my partner ejaculated inside or not. Now I am uncertain if I should take another pill because according to the internet, it is not wise to take these pills this frequently. However, I also do not want to become. Please help.
